end end end end end i=#a return q(O)end,function(h,f)local q=o(f)local S=function(...)return i(h,{...},f,q)end return S end,function(h,f)local q=o(f)local S=function(S,t)return i(h,{S;t},f,q)end return S end,{},function(h,f)local q=o(f)local S=function(S)return i(h,{S},f,q)end return S end,function(h,f)local q=o(f)local S=function(S,t,a)return i(h,{S;t,a},f,q)end return S end return(d(-25626+12464742,{}))(q(O))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[f(-474635-(-535974))],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
